creator: rolf.sommerhalder@alumni.ethz.ch
text:
Just noticed that ISC now provides read-only Guest access to their ticket system:
 https://bugs.isc.org/Public/

This allows me to catch up and understand the other side of the conversation with with the experts at ISC regarding this thread :-)
 https://bugs.isc.org/Public/Bug/Display.html?id=43093

Eventually, I make another attempt to build BIND 9.10 or 9.11 such that it uses its "new" native PKCS11 interface to "PCKS11 providers" of some Hardware Security Modules (HSM), that expose APIs like SoftHSM does, without involving OpenSSL as an intermediary...
